---
title: 'I&#39;m just so tired...'
date: '2016-11-27T08:54:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3601567833411806312'
blogger_filename: '/2016/11/i-just-so-tired.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Renewing the Mind (Stinking Thinking)'
  - 'Resting'
  - 'In The Mire'
  - 'Emotions'
  - 'Freedom/Kairos'
---

I'm just so tired...<br /><br />Why is so hard at home ? Why can't I be "real" here in my own house? Why am I so guarded? <br /><br />Listening to Bryan D. thinking about it:&nbsp;<a href="https://youtu.be/RVgg0gCFj2g?list=RDRHa5VMlKSxQ" target="_blank">Bryan Duncan Traces of Heaven</a><br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/RVgg0gCFj2g?list=RDRHa5VMlKSxQ" width="560"></iframe> <br /><br /><br />So, broken or whole, "right or wrong", that's what I'm thinking about today,<br /><br />Darrell W. <br /><br />
